findings.description: Figure caption zh is '考试中会出现！' — slightly shorter than a full translation of the jp '試験にはコレが出る！' but semantically equivalent. No material error.

reviewer_notes: R1.1 fix confirmed: figure::p060::17 caption jp is '試験にはコレが出る！' as required. The income statement table (14 rows including header) matches the image exactly including ★ markers and reference amounts. All four ★ terms (売上総利益, 営業利益, 経常利益, 当期純利益) are represented both in the table and as standalone term entities. The second figure (営業と営業外、経常と特別) accurately reflects the 学習のポイント box. Overall release is highly accurate.
